{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241140458D38AA960D8BA51ED331"}"},"total":1006},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7475659912782824217","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"怎么说呢，这本虽然是我认为的爽文，但是他却有很多爽文没有的东西，能让我感觉到作者在写的时候真正的写进去了他的感情，以及他的一些生活感悟。是一本很好的书，节奏也很舒服，不拖拉也不太快。推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740567444,"group_id":"7389096666046925849","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyCWF8ftlMmHyLHEwwon/WX1g+e+9vCru/tJABScf7y1","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878784&x-signature=ERVL9Rcfar7EvAmuYrjtVsb%2FAZk%3D","user_id":"1163744208502140","user_name":"zx白"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1163744208502140","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7389096666046925849","book_info":{"abstract":"【高武、系统、热血、剑道、不圣母】
苏白穿越高武世界，因为觉醒天赋低劣，丧失高考资格，一气之下前往边境杀妖。
怎料初入边境，便觉醒了杀妖爆点系统，只要杀妖，就能爆点。
【恭喜宿主加点成功，修为突破观海境！】
【恭喜宿主加点成功，天赋升级为SSS！】
【恭喜宿主加点成功，武器晋级诛仙剑！】
谁说微末不可登高，我靠杀妖横推万古成至尊！
多年以后，妖族举族入侵，人名命运悬于一线！
苏白手持长剑，立于亿万人族跟前，以一己之力，撼动整个妖族！
那一天，
人族看到这一幕，疯狂泪崩！
“谁说凡人之躯不可比肩神明，苏白，就是我们的神！”
“虽千万人，吾亦往矣，苏白，你是我浩大人族的英雄！”
“三千剑气染苍穹，不斩大妖不归乡，苏白，我愿随你一道杀妖！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oc306876986f425d4b5e44dea9f087102~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"摆摊宝剑师","author_id":"","book_id":"7389096666046925849","book_name":"无缘高考，边境杀成人族至尊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":80,"name":"剑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=80&name=剑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7389120824801755673","read_count":"22733","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1500571"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"598","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,剑道","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/34935ffe0ab6980c0dfd3d5045714f9a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779507645&x-signature=wUGtmvcYdJ%2FfM9yBC32NWpoVUyQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1289064350744888","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"404"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241140458D38AA960D8BA51ED331"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":46412,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":30767},"user_a
